meaning: n.蜿蜒的河流,漫步,聊天adj.蜿蜒的,漫步的,聊天的
examples: We crossed a small iron bridge over a meandering stream.
This one is just a meandering in the woods path.
As a braided river, typified by shallow, meandering channels separated by sandbars, it is an ideal crane habitat.
An economy meandering its way through tough times has Wal-Mart back on top of retailing.
